hero.badge: Uponco is in beta — everything is free right now
hero.heading: Simple pricing, no surprises
hero.subtitle: Uponco is your digital bridge to your customers. Start free, stay free for your first 100 appointments, and pay a flat rate per user only when you outgrow them.

beta.heading: Free while Uponco is in beta
beta.description: Uponco is currently in beta, so every feature is free for every business — there is nothing to pay and no card to enter. When paid plans begin, we will tell you by email well before anything is charged, and you will never be billed without confirming first.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Your first 100 appointments are free forever.

features.publicPage: Your own public booking page and website widget

growth.name: Per user
growth.tagline: After your free 100 appointments, pay only for the people who take bookings.

features.perUser: €5.00 per month for each team member who takes bookings
features.everything: Everything in Free, with no feature limits
features.cancel: Cancel any time — no contract, no lock-in

items.team: Team members, working hours and per-specialist availability
items.widget: Public booking page and embeddable website widget
items.google: Optional Google Calendar and Google Meet integration

counts.question: What counts as an appointment?
counts.answer: Every booking confirmed through Uponco counts as one appointment, whether it was made on your public booking page or added by your team. Cancelled bookings are not counted against your free 100.

afterFree.question: What happens after my free 100 appointments?
afterFree.answer: Nothing breaks. Uponco keeps working, and while we are in beta it stays free. When paid plans launch, you will be asked to choose a plan before anything is charged.

whoIsAUser.question: Who counts as a user?
whoIsAUser.answer: A user is a team member with an Uponco account who takes bookings or manages the calendar. Your customers never need an account and are never charged.

cancel.question: Can I cancel?
cancel.answer: Yes. There is no contract and no minimum term. You can cancel, export your data and close your account at any time.

cta.heading: Ready to take your first booking?
cta.subtitle: Set up your business in about five minutes. No card, no commitment.
